rag_rules: Fix AGREE diagnostics by resolving named thing type errors through visible identifiers or helper declarations in the same annex
Move implementation-level bindings from component type annexes to implementation annexes when diagnostics reference subcomponent paths
generic_rules: When AGREE reports type mismatches, ensure helper declarations match the actual expression types
Validate that all identifiers in AGREE contracts are visible in the current scope and properly declared
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must use only visible AADL features or locally declared helpers; avoid package-qualified names not in the model
Implementation-level guarantees and assignments must reside in component implementation annexes, not type annexes
anti_patterns: Do not introduce new identifiers or types in AGREE contracts that are not present in the AADL model or its dependencies
Do not place implementation-level references in component type annexes without proper scope migration
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about property associations
AGREE validator diagnostics about annex placement
